overview: An MCQ practice app for AIAPGET Unani medicine exam with year-wise and subject-wise question browsing, quiz mode, and admin management for subscriptions and payments.
features: Browse 2019-2025 AIAPGET Unani questions by year or subject
Quiz mode with 60-second timer per question
20 official AIAPGET Unani subjects with correct categorization
Admin Management page with Payments and Subscriptions tabs
Approve/Reject subscription requests with audit logs
Persistent subscription and payment data that survives app updates
